summary: First-finish smoke test for Mayank Bhardwaj marketing site. Backend (5/5) and frontend (8/8 critical flows) all pass. Blog seeded with 3 posts, contact form persists to Mongo, theme toggle switches to dark, testimonials slider rotates, FAQ accordion expands, blog list/detail navigation works, contact form submits with success toast.
passed: GET /api/blog returns 3 seeded posts with expected slugs
GET /api/blog/{valid-slug} returns 200 with content; invalid slug returns 404
POST /api/contact (200) stores contact and returns id+created_at; GET /api/contact confirms persistence
POST /api/contact did not fail request even with Emergent Resend email flow
Home page loads with all sections (hero-section, services-section, case-studies-section, about, testimonials, pricing, faq, blog-preview, cta-banner, contact)
Theme toggle switches html class from light to dark
Testimonial next button rotates testimonial content
FAQ accordion first item transitions data-state from closed to open on click
Contact form submits with valid data and shows success toast
/blog route lists 3 blog cards; clicking navigates to /blog/{slug} detail page with content
notes: Section IDs used data-testid convention (hero-section, blog-preview, etc.) rather than raw #hero — verified via DOM enumeration. Mobile menu (Sheet) and Navbar smooth-scroll not explicitly tested but nav testids exist (mobile-menu-btn, nav-* buttons).
